name: Lorne Michaels
description: Canadian and American television producer, writer, and actor (born 1944)
abstract: Lorne Michaels (born Lorne David Lipowitz; November 17, 1944) is a Canadian and American television and film producer, comedian, screenwriter and director. He created and produced Saturday Night Live (1975–1980, since 1985) and produced the Late Night series (since 1993), The Kids in the Hall (from 1989 to 1995), and The Tonight Show (si…

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: I was the arranger for Saturday Night Live from 1975 to 1985... We did it for Lorne Michaels, producer... He put us on the show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023
